CustomNPC+ Javadoc Reference
Back to Index
  • All Classes
 

Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IAction
    Represents a single "task" that can be executed over multiple ticks, supports delayed start, limited duration, repeating intervals, data storage, and chaining to neighboring tasks.
    IActionChain  
    IActionListener
    Listener interface for action hooks.
    IActionQueue  
    IAnimation  
    IAnimationData
    Holds and manages animation data for an animatable entity.
    IAnvilRecipe  
    IAttributeDefinition
    Defines the blueprint for an attribute.
    IAuctionClaim
    Represents an auction claim (item or currency to be collected).
    IAuctionListing
    Represents an auction listing.
    IAvailability
    Defines the conditions that determine if certain NPC interactions (dialogs, quests, and faction requirements) are available to a player.
    ICustomAttribute
    Represents an instance of a custom attribute.
    ICustomEffect  
    IDialog  
    IDialogCategory  
    IDialogImage  
    IDialogOption  
    IFaction  
    IFrame  
    IFramePart  
    ILine
    Represents a single NPC dialog line with text, an optional sound, and target formatting.
    ILines
    A collection of dialog lines, supporting creation, indexed access, and random retrieval.
    ILinkedItem
    Represents a linked item definition.
    IMagic
    Represents a magic element that can have interactions with other magics.
    IMagicCycle
    Represents a cycle (or category) grouping for magics.
    IMagicData  
    INaturalSpawn
    Configures a natural spawn entry for custom NPCs, including entity templates, biome restrictions, spawn conditions, and cooldowns.
    IParty  
    IPartyOptions
    Configures party-related options for quests, controlling membership requirements, reward distribution, completion rules, and party size limits.
    IPlayerAttributes
    Represents a collection of a player's custom attributes.
    IPlayerEffect
    Represents an active custom effect instance on a player.
    IPlayerMail
    Represents a mail message sent to a player, containing pages of text, sender info, optional quest, and item attachments.
    IProfile  
    IProfileOptions  
    IQuest
    Represents a quest with objectives, rewards, repeatability, and party/profile options.
    IQuestCategory
    Represents a category that groups related quests together.
    IQuestDialog
    Quest objective interface for dialog-type quests.
    IQuestInterface
    Marker interface for quest objective types (e.g., kill, item, location, dialog).
    IQuestItem
    Quest objective interface for item-collection quests.
    IQuestKill
    Quest objective interface for kill-type quests.
    IQuestLocation
    Quest objective interface for location-based quests.
    IQuestObjective  
    IRecipe
    Represents a custom crafting recipe for the carpentry table or vanilla workbench.
    ISlot  
    ISound
    Represents a sound that can be played at a position or attached to an entity, with configurable volume, pitch, repeat behavior, and position.
    ITag
    Represents a tag that can be applied to NPCs for categorization and filtering.
    ITransportCategory
    Represents a category that groups transport locations together.
    ITransportLocation
    Represents a transport destination that players can teleport to.
